LanguageData.VAEI_DeepTalkQuestion.stages.0.label: deep talk?
LanguageData.VAEI_DirtyRoom.stages.0.description: The room I’m in is slightly dirty. It scares me.
LanguageData.VAEI_DirtyRoom.stages.0.label: slightly dirty surroundings
LanguageData.VAEI_DirtyRoom.stages.1.description: The room I’m in is dirty. It repulses me.
LanguageData.VAEI_DirtyRoom.stages.1.label: dirty surroundings
LanguageData.VAEI_DirtyRoom.stages.2.description: The room I’m in is incredibly dirty. I need to leave it as soon as possible.
LanguageData.VAEI_DirtyRoom.stages.2.label: very dirty surroundings
LanguageData.VAEI_Gagged.stages.0.label: gagged
LanguageData.VAEI_KindWordsQuestion.stages.0.descript: I think I’ve been bestowed with kind words. I think.
LanguageData.VAEI_KindWordsQuestion.stages.0.label: kind words?
LanguageData.VAEI_MockedMemory.stages.0.label: mocked
LanguageData.VAEI_MockedMood.stages.0.description: My insecurities were mocked! What an evil person!
LanguageData.VAEI_MockedMood.stages.0.label: mocked
LanguageData.VAEI_MoodSwing.stages.0.description: I'm feeling a gentle happiness, like a quiet smile spreading through my day.
LanguageData.VAEI_MoodSwing.stages.0.label: happy thoughts
LanguageData.VAEI_MoodSwing.stages.1.description: I'm riding a wave of joy and positivity, feeling truly happy and content.
LanguageData.VAEI_MoodSwing.stages.1.label: very happy thoughts
LanguageData.VAEI_MoodSwing.stages.2.description: I'm feeling weighed down by a sadness that's hard to shake off.
LanguageData.VAEI_MoodSwing.stages.2.label: sad thoughts
LanguageData.VAEI_MoodSwing.stages.3.description: My heart feels crushed by an intense and deep sadness, almost too much to bear.
LanguageData.VAEI_MoodSwing.stages.3.label: very sad thoughts
LanguageData.VAEI_Rehumanized.stages.0.description: It’s so good to finally feel normal again. Well, mostly normal.
LanguageData.VAEI_Rehumanized.stages.0.label: rehumanized
LanguageData.VAEI_Restrained.stages.0.description: I want to take off this straitjacket! I can’t do anything!
LanguageData.VAEI_Restrained.stages.0.label: restrained
Clarity pierces like a knife. The mundane truth is painfully dull.
Doubt creeps in, questioning the chaos. Why does this clarity feel like chains?
Feelings of normalcy gnaw at my mind, erasing the beautiful madness.
LanguageData.VAEI_SanityEffectWithoutInhumanized.stag: The world begins to bend at the edges; reality feels less certain.
Things are slipping away, and whispers echo in the corners of my mind.
My grip loosens; shadows dance and the world spins uncontrollably.
I am adrift in the void, untethered from the anchors of reality and reason.
LanguageData.VAEI_Suspicious.stages.0.label: suspicious
LanguageData.VAEI_VileSlanderMemory.stages.0.label: vile slander
LanguageData.VAEI_VileSlanderMood.stages.0.descriptio: I was accused of something absolutely vile! How could they say that?
LanguageData.VAEI_VileSlanderMood.stages.0.label: vile slander
LanguageData.VAEI_VoidDrawings.stages.0.description: I witnessed a very eerie drawing. It feels like it speaks to me.
LanguageData.VAEI_VoidDrawings.stages.0.label: observed void drawings
LanguageData.VAEI_VoidHarmed.stages.0.description: I have harmed myself for the void. I can feel the sweet embrace of darkness.
LanguageData.VAEI_VoidHarmed.stages.0.label: void harmed
